vt:vector.vt:lpstr: 1. GEM players are confronting an increasingly more challenging environment
1. Winners in GEM are outpacing peers in growth, and their shareholders are reaping the rewards
McKinsey is well-positioned to help GEM clients grow, with a proven track record
We suggest starting with an 8-week discovery sprint to understand nuances unique to X client
In the discovery phase, we will estimate value at stake and identify areas of opportunity
1. We will use several assets and sources of insight to evaluate opportunities
The discovery phase provides a top-down opportunity sizing with prioritized levers and a roadmap to execution
Size the opportunity: We use transaction data to quantify value across multiple levers
Size the opportunity: Detailed insights by lever codifies the opportunity and guides the path to value capture
Lever determination: Discovery phase will help guide which levers will be most impactful
Lever determination: Example seller time and automation analysis
Lever determination: Example commercial capability assessment
We will work as one team, collaborating closely throughout the project
Closing perspective – why would you partner with us on an IDP?
This commercial playbook has driven material impact across industries and client situations
Case Study: Specialty chemicals and advanced materials company
